launch.title: Connect to Your Health Records
launch.subtitle: We'll securely connect to your health records to prepare your visit summary.
launch.sandbox: SMART Health IT Sandbox — select any test patient
launch.privacy: Your data is never stored. It is used only to generate your visit summary.

consent.title: Before We Begin
consent.subtitle: Please review how we use your health information.

points.1: We read your health records from your provider's system.
points.2: Your information is used only to create your visit summary.
points.3: We do not store your medical data on our servers.
points.4: You can opt out at any time.

brief.title: Your Visit Summary
brief.subtitle: Prepared for your upcoming appointment
brief.meds: Medications to Confirm with Your Doctor
brief.urgentNote: If you are having a medical emergency, call 911 immediately.
brief.notMedicalAdvice: This summary is for informational purposes only. Always follow your doctor's advice.
brief.error: We had trouble loading your summary. Please try again.

optOut.title: Opt Out of Summaries
optOut.message: You've chosen not to receive visit summaries. You can re-connect at any time.
optOut.done: You have been opted out successfully.

outreach.title: Outreach
outreach.scriptContent: Hi {name}, this is a reminder about your upcoming appointment. We've prepared a health summary to help you prepare. You can view it at: {link}

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.brief: Could not generate your summary. Please try again.
errors.sms: Could not send SMS. Please try again.
